\---

name: Feature Request

about: Suggest an idea for the OS

title: "\[FEATURE] "

labels: enhancement

assignees: ''



\---



\## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.



\## Problem Statement

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the use case it addresses.



\## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working. Include:

\- Core functionality

\- User interactions

\- Expected behavior

\- Configuration options (if applicable)



\## Alternative Solutions

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Describe them here.



\## Benefits

What benefits would this feature bring?

\- \[ ] Improves performance

\- \[ ] Enhances user experience

\- \[ ] Adds functionality

\- \[ ] Improves compatibility

\- \[ ] Other: \_\_\_



\## Implementation Considerations

\- \*\*Estimated Difficulty:\*\* Easy / Medium / Hard

\- \*\*Breaking Changes:\*\* Yes / No

\- \*\*New Dependencies:\*\* Yes / No (if yes, list them)

\- \*\*Impact:\*\* \[e.g. affects all users, specific modules, etc.]



\## Example Use Case

Provide a concrete example of how this feature would be used:



```

Example scenario:

1\. User does X

2\. System provides Y

3\. User achieves Z

```



\## Mockups/Sketches

If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or sketches showing your vision.



\## Related Issues

Related to #(issue number, if applicable)

Similar to #(issue number, if applicable)



\## Additional Context

Add any other relevant context, references, or research here.



\---



\*\*Before submitting:\*\* 

\- \[ ] I've checked existing issues and feature requests

\- \[ ] This aligns with the project's scope and roadmap

\- \[ ] I've provided enough detail for the team to understand
